response_checks.missing_information_response_check: reject when required facts, documents, or confirmations are absent
response_checks.stale_evidence_stop_check: stop when cited evidence is stale, conflicting, or unverified
response_checks.reversible_draft_check: allow only reversible draft work before confirmation
response_checks.local_pdf_preview_check: allow only local PDF preview and never official upload or submission
response_checks.exact_confirmation_checkpoint_check: require action-specific user confirmation before consequential steps
response_checks.refused_consequential_action_check: refuse submission, certification, upload, scheduling, cancellation, or official changes
response_checks.refused_financial_action_check: refuse payment detail entry and payment execution
response_checks.rollback_visibility_check: show reversible changes and rollback path before proceeding
response_checks.source_citation_explanation_check: explain answers with cited public source references and evidence status
response_checks.manual_handoff_check: handoff to attended user control for authenticated or official actions

notes: No authenticated browser state, official completion, guarantee, or active mutation state is included.
